name: QA 1813
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1813

Check instances labels changing between script runs

https://github.com/performancecopilot/pcp/issues/1030



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



if [ $# -eq 0 ]

then

seq=`basename $0`

echo "QA output created by $seq"

else

use $seq from caller, unless not set

[ -n "$seq" ] || seq=`basename $0`

echo "QA output created by `basename $0` $*"

fi

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1813.out.bad)
1a2,14
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>   File "/usr/bin/pmrep", line 40, in <module>
>     from pcp import pmapi, pmi, pmconfig
>   File "/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/pcp/pmi.py", line 126, in <module>
>     LIBPCP_IMPORT.pmiWrite2.restype = c_int
>     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3.12/ctypes/__init__.py", line 392, in __getattr__
>     func = self.__getitem__(name)
>            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
>   File "/usr/lib/python3.12/ctypes/__init__.py", line 397, in __getitem__
>     func = self._FuncPtr((name_or_ordinal, self))
>            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> AttributeError: /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcp_import.so.2: undefined symbol: pmiWrite2
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
